source_pr.title: *: update privilege Checker interface and use it
source_pr.body:
* modify the privilege.Checker interface
* use new implementation to check privilege
* add command line flag to enable/disable privilege feature

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it compared two slices whose order was nondeterministic (visitInfo collected during planning). This PR stabilizes it by sorting both slices before asserting equality, making the comparison deterministic.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: files: bootstrap_test.go, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, perfschema/perfschema_test.go, plan/resolver_test.go, plan/typeinferer_test.go, privilege/privileges/cache_test.go, privilege/privileges/privileges_test.go, server/tidb_test.go, session.go, session_test.go, sessionctx/binloginfo/binloginfo_test.go, store/tikv/gc_worker_test.go, store/tikv/store_test.go, store/tikv/ticlient_test.go, table/tables/tables_test.go, tidb-server/main.go, tidb_test.go, domain/domain.go, privilege/privileges/cache.go, tidb.go, executor/executor_simple.go, executor/grant.go, plan/logical_plan_builder.go, plan/logical_plan_test.go, plan/optimizer.go, plan/planbuilder.go, plan/preprocess.go, privilege/privilege.go, privilege/privileges/privileges.go
